title: DWP and CMG: spending over £500, September 2025
body: "The Department for Work and Pensions (DWP) and Child Maintenance Group (CMG) publishes details of all spending over £500 using an electronic purchasing card solution (ePCS) on a monthly basis. The ePCS replaced the government procurement card (GPC).  This data is also available on data.gov.uk:   DWP and CMG ePCS transactions   "
